description: This Formula One inspired footwear is as high on style as on function. Pair it with skinny Fit bottoms and a funky t-shirt to look stunning.Upper Synthetic upper with lace-up front for snug fit and longer shoe life Padded tongue for soft feel Padded sockliner for snug fit and better shock absorption Rubber heel counter embedded into the upper for enhanced shoe life Perforations around the heel counter for ventilation Midsole Lightweight EVA midsole for better shock absorption Soft footbed for an ergonomic fit Outsole Carbon rubber outsole with rubber eyelets for flexible 180 degree movement along the toe counter Multi-directional rubber patches below the heel counter for comfort walking Wash careDo not machine washRub with soft cloth to clear off dust and dirt
